from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples into a single fluent sentence.
    Unknown predicates fall back to a generic pattern.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple predicate‑to‑phrase mapping for more natural wording
    phrase_map = {
        "cityServed": "{s} serves the city of {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "{s} is {o} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "{s} is {o} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "{s} is {o} metres above sea level",
        "location": "{s} is located in {o}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "{s} is operated by {o}",
        "runwayLength": "The runway length of {s} is {o} metres",
        "runwayLengthFeet": "The runway length of {s} is {o} feet",
        "runwayName": "The runway at {s} is named {o}",
        "country": "{s} is located in {o}",
        "isPartOf": "{s} is part of {o}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "The length of the first runway at {s} is {o} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "The length of the first runway at {s} is {o} metres",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "The first runway at {s} is numbered {o}",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "The first runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "The second runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": "The length of the third runway at {s} is {o} feet",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "The third runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": "The length of the fourth runway at {s} is {o} feet",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "The fourth runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "5thRunwayNumber": "The fifth runway at {s} is numbered {o}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "The fifth runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "{o} is the ICAO identifier of {s}",
        "locationIdentifier": "{o} is the location identifier of {s}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "{o} is the IATA identifier of {s}",
        "nativeName": "{s} is also known as {o}",
        "leaderParty": "{s} is governed by the {o} party",
        "capital": "The capital of {s} is {o}",
        "language": "The language of {s} is {o}",
        "leader": "The leader of {s} is {o}",
        "owner": "{s} is owned by {o}",
        "largestCity": "{s} has the largest city {o}",
        "mayor": "The mayor of {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": "The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "city": "{s} is a city called {o}",
        "jurisdiction": "{s} jurisdiction is {o}",
        "demonym": "Residents of {s} are called {o}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": "{s} operates helicopter {o}",
        "transportAircraft": "{s} operates transport aircraft {o}",
        "currency": "{s} uses the {o}",
        "headquarter": "The headquarters of {s} are located in {o}",
        "class": "{s} belongs to class {o}",
        "division": "{s} belongs to the division of {o}",
        "order": "{s} belongs to the order of {o}",
        "regionServed": "{s} serves the region {o}",
        "leaderTitle": "{s} has the leader title {o}",
        "hubAirport": "{s} uses hub airport {o}",
        "aircraftFighter": "{s} flies fighter {o}",
        "attackAircraft": "{s} flies attack aircraft {o}",
        "battle": "{s} participated in {o}",
        "countySeat": "{s} has county seat {o}",
        "chief": "{s} is led by chief {o}",
        "foundedBy": "{s} was founded by {o}",
        "postalCode": "{s} has postal code {o}",
        "areaCode": "{s} has area code {o}",
        "foundingYear": "{s} was founded in {o}",
        "ceremonialCounty": "{s} is in ceremonial county {o}",
    }

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        # Strip surrounding quotes from object if present
        obj = t.object
        # Normalize object case for certain predicates
        if t.predicate in ("division", "order", "class"):
            obj = obj.lower()
        if (obj.startswith('"') and obj.endswith('"')) or (obj.startswith("'") and obj.endswith("'")):
            obj = obj[1:-1]
        # Clean language/object suffixes for more natural phrasing
        if t.predicate in ("language", "officialLanguage") and obj.lower().endswith(" language"):
            obj = obj.rsplit(" ", 1)[0]
        # Preserve numeric formatting: keep original decimal part if present,
        # otherwise remove trailing .0 for clean integers.
        try:
            # Detect if original object had a decimal point
            has_decimal = "." in obj
            num = float(obj)
            if num.is_integer():
                if has_decimal:
                    # Keep one decimal place (e.g., 2776.0)
                    obj = f"{int(num)}.0"
                else:
                    obj = str(int(num))
            else:
                # Round to two decimal places, strip trailing zeros
                obj = f"{round(num, 2)}".rstrip('0').rstrip('.')
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            pass
        # Adjust subject for specific predicates
        subj = t.subject
        if t.predicate == "country" and "," in subj:
            subj = subj.split(",")[0].strip()
        tmpl = phrase_map.get(t.predicate)
        if tmpl:
            clause = tmpl.format(s=subj, o=obj)
        else:
            # fallback generic wording
            clause = f"{subj} has {t.predicate} {obj}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    # Join clauses into a single fluent sentence with proper conjunctions
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    # Order clauses: prioritize subject‑oriented facts (cityServed, country, location) first
    priority = {
        "cityServed": 1, "country": 2, "location": 3, "operatingOrganisation": 4,
        "runwayLength": 5, "runwayLengthFeet":5, "runwayName":5, "runwaySurfaceType":5,
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet":5, "1stRunwayLengthMetre":5, "1stRunwayNumber":5,
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType":5, "2ndRunwaySurfaceType":5, "3rdRunwayLengthFeet":5,
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType":5, "4thRunwayLengthFeet":5,"4thRunwaySurfaceType":5,
        "5thRunwayNumber":5,"5thRunwaySurfaceType":5, "iataLocationIdentifier":6,
        "icaoLocationIdentifier":6, "locationIdentifier":6
    }
    # sort by defined priority, unknown predicates get low priority
    sorted_clauses = [c for _,c in sorted(zip([priority.get(t.predicate, 99) for t in triples], clauses))]
    if len(sorted_clauses) == 1:
        sentence = sorted_clauses[0]
    else:
        # Lowercase the first word of subsequent clauses for smoother flow
        lowered = [sorted_clauses[0]]
        for c in sorted_clauses[1:]:
            if c:
                lowered.append(c[0].lower() + c[1:])
            else:
                lowered.append(c)
        sentence = ", ".join(lowered[:-1]) + ", and " + lowered[-1]
    sentence = sentence.rstrip()
    if not sentence.endswith('.'):
        sentence += '.'
    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
